message:
feat(fs): add set_len, metadata, set_permissions to IoUringFile + tests (bd-3vb8)

- Add set_len() for truncate/extend via ftruncate syscall with position clamping
- Add metadata() for file stats via fstat
- Add set_permissions() for chmod
- Add tests: truncate, extend, metadata query, 64KB large I/O verification
- All 8 io_uring tests pass

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
